_note: The `n - (n/2)*2` idiom is an integer-modulo trick. With `/` now float division (dual-engine canonical), n/2*2 == n for all n, so remainder is always 0 and is_even returns true for every input. The language has no integer-division or modulo operator, so this is the correct float-arithmetic result; both engines agree. A true even-check needs a future `mod` builtin.
